instruction:
Thus, $\tilde{u}=0.49543$ can have two significant figures. What is the smaller positive root of the quadratic equation $x^{2}-16 \, x+1=0$ rounded to three significant figures?

Options:
A. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 2}\approx0. 0 6 2 8 \,.
$$
B. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 6}\approx0. 0 6 3 0 \,.
$$
C. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 7}\approx0. 0 6 3 5 \,.
$$
D. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{7 0}\approx0. 0 6 1 8 \,.
$$
E. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 9}\approx0. 0 6 2 3 \,.
$$
F. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 5}\approx0. 0 6 2 9 \,.
$$
G. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 3}\approx0. 0 6 2 7 \,.
$$
H. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 8}\approx0. 0 6 2 4 \,.
$$
I. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{7 1}\approx0. 0 6 2 2 \,.
$$
J. $$
x_{1}=8-\ \sqrt{6 4}\approx0. 0 6 2 5 \,.
$$
